results.title: VeriSilicon Drives Commercial Adoption of AV2 Across New Video and Streaming Applications
results.description: VeriSilicon announced that its VC9800D Video Processing Unit(VPU) IP supports AV2 decoding, further expanding the company’s advanced video codec portfolio for next-generation video and streaming applications.
